_comment: Saved RTK offset presets, bundled with the app so they survive an accidental delete from within Route View. Values are the average of the LOCAL -> POLARIS measurements across Office, Rio Concho, and Rio Rojo from the 2026-07-15 RTK field test (regionally consistent within ~13 cm across all three sites, per Finding 1 of the field test report). Units are metres. Loaded automatically on first run and available any time via the Shift route panel's 'Restore defaults' button.
